results.title: Riber receives a new order from Japan for MBE 6000 to scale Quantum Dot Laser production for Datacom
results.snippet: RIBER has received an order for an MBE 6000 production system from QD Laser in Japan for scaling quantum dot laser production for datacom applications. The system is scheduled for shipment in 2026.

results.title: RIBER - Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) products and services
results.snippet: Riber is the world’s leading supplier of Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) equipment for compound semiconductor research and industrial production. Their systems enable precise deposition of thin material layers for advanced semiconductor devices.

results.title: Riber's full-year 2025 revenue falls by 2% to €40.3m, but expects growth in 2026
results.snippet: Riber reported €40.3m in revenue for 2025, a 2% decline from the prior year. The company forecasts revenue growth in 2026 driven by demand for MBE production systems for quantum dot lasers and progress on the ROSIE platform for silicon-based integrated photonics.

results.title: Riber receives a new order from Japan for MBE 6000 to scale Quantum Dot Laser production for Datacom
results.snippet: Riber announced an order from Japanese firm QD Laser for an MBE 6000 system optimized for GaAs-based quantum dots used in optical Datacom. The system is scheduled to ship in 2026.

results.title: Press releases - Riber, Molecular Beam Epitaxy products and services
results.snippet: This page lists Riber's latest press releases including the January 2026 announcement of a new order from Japan for an MBE 6000 system to scale quantum dot laser production. Riber specializes in molecular beam epitaxy equipment for the semiconductor industry.

results.title: Riber's net income grows 27% in 2025 to €5.2m, despite ...
results.snippet: Riber reported a 27% increase in net income for 2025 to €5.2m. The company enters 2026 with positive growth outlook, expecting milestones with ROSIE 2 manufacturing and first BTO/STO thin-film samples on silicon.

results.title: RIBER - Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) products and services
results.snippet: Riber is the world’s leading supplier of Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) equipment, tools, and services for compound semiconductor research and industrial applications.

results.title: Riber's full-year 2025 revenue falls by 2% to €40.3m, but ...
results.snippet: Riber's 2025 revenue declined slightly to €40.3m, but the company expects return to annual revenue growth in 2026 driven by demand for MBE systems in quantum dot lasers, AI, and quantum technologies.

results.title: Press releases - Riber, Molecular Beam Epitaxy products and ...
results.snippet: Riber received a new order from Japan for an MBE 6000 system in January 2026 to scale Quantum Dot Laser production for Datacom applications.

results.title: Riber 2026 Company Profile: Stock Performance & Earnings
results.snippet: As of April 2026, Riber's stock price is $6.43 with a market cap of $135M. The French company designs and produces molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) systems for the semiconductor industry.

results.title: A Look At Riber (ENXTPA:ALRIB) Valuation After The ...
results.snippet: Riber (ENXTPA:ALRIB) has drawn fresh attention after its Board proposed a cash distribution of €0.10 per share, a 25% increase via partial issue premium reimbursement, subject to shareholder approval in June 2026. The stock has seen sharp recent gains including a 111% 7-day return.

results.title: Riber S.A.'s (EPA:ALRIB) Stock Is Going Strong: Is the Market Following Fundamentals?
results.snippet: Riber (EPA:ALRIB) has had a great run on the share market with its stock up by a significant 61% over the last three months. Earnings growth remains a major factor in the company's stock valuation.

results.title: ALRIB.PA Forecast, Price Target & Analyst Ratings
results.snippet: The average analyst price target for ALRIB.PA is 5.41 EUR, implying a potential decrease of about 40% from the current price near 9 EUR. Next earnings are forecasted for release on July 22, 2026.

results.title: Riber SA Share Price, Forecast & Financials (EPA:ALRIB)
results.snippet: Riber SA (EPA:ALRIB) share price reached €9.00 with an 11.8% gain on the day. Key upcoming events include the annual shareholders meeting in June 2026 and half year results in July 2026.

results.title: Riber (EPA:ALRIB) Stock Price & Overview
results.snippet: In 2024, Riber reported revenue of 41.15 million EUR, up 4.82% from the prior year, with earnings of 4.12 million EUR. The company specializes in molecular beam epitaxy products for compound semiconductors.
